commands.review_summary:
The branch modifies `skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview` to append CPU time, RSS, and process state to heartbeat lines and adds a heartbeat metrics self-test flag.

Reproducibility: yes. for the patch defect: source inspection shows the new metric sampler calls `subprocess.run(["ps", ...])` directly while the existing helper has a resolver that excludes repo-controlled PATH entries. I did not need to execute a hostile fixture to confirm the bypass path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer action is needed to fix the security finding and provide real behavior proof; this should not be sent to an automated repair lane while external real-setup proof is still contributor-owned.

target.title: [codex] add autoreview heartbeat metrics
target.body:
## Summary

Adds CPU, RSS, and process state details to autoreview heartbeat lines so long-running reviews show whether the reviewer process is idle or doing work.

## Why

When an engine keeps printing heartbeat lines forever, the old output only showed elapsed time and PID. The new metrics make it easier to distinguish an idle wrapper from an actively running reviewer.

## Validation

- `scripts/validate-skills`
- `ruby -c scripts/install-skills && ruby -c scripts/validate-skills`
- `bash -n skills/autoreview/scripts/test-review-harness`
- `python3 -m py_compile skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview skills/autoreview/scripts/test-review-harness.py`
- `node --check skills/agent-transcript/scripts/agent-transcript`
- `node --test skills/agent-transcript/scripts/agent-transcript.test.mjs skills/session-viewer/scripts/session-viewer.test.ts`
- `skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --self-test-heartbeat-metrics`
- `skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --self-test-engine-isolation`

## Manual heartbeat checks

- idle fake Codex: `cpu=0.0s/60s(0%) rss=8M state=S`
- busy child fake Codex: `cpu=57.6s/60s(96%) rss=17M state=R,S`
- stream mode fake Codex: `cpu=0.0s/60s(0%) rss=8M state=S`
target.author: tristanmanchester
